cross_scene_arcs.title: Carter and Lee's Partnership Evolution
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Carter's relationship with Lee shifts from suspicion and deception through dominance assertions, confrontations, and hostility to empathy after learning Lee's personal motivation, solidifying into a trusted partnership and friendship.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Carter is deceived by Lee about the case and remains suspicious.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Carter and Lee are friends, exchanging gifts and planning a trip together.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Carter's Involvement in the Ricky Tan Case
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Carter progresses from being kept out of the case to actively disrupting operations, confronting suspects like Ricky Tan and Hu Li, being recruited by the Secret Service, and assisting in subduing Ricky Tan, leading to his death.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Carter is unaware of the embassy bombing and Ricky Tan's involvement.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Ricky Tan is dead, and Carter has contributed to the case resolution through confrontations and partnerships.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The mission to locate Hu Li's counterfeit plates for the U.S. Secret Service remains incomplete.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Adversarial Confrontations with Lee and Carter
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Hu Li repeatedly engages in violent conflicts with Inspector Lee and Carter, from roof attacks and bomb delivery to capture and a final murder-suicide attempt.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Hu Li attacks Lee and Carter on the roof and escapes.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Hu Li, injured, activates a bomb intending to die with Lee and Carter.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether Lee and Carter escape the bomb explosion.

cross_scene_arcs.title: From Subordinate to Assassin of Ricky Tan
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: After being dismissed by Ricky Tan and showing emotional distress, Hu Li later shoots him dead on the yacht deck.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Hu Li is upset after being ordered to leave by Tan.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Hu Li kills Tan and flees with bodyguards.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Her motives for killing Tan are not fully explained.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Calm Execution and Escape
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Hu Li remains calm during an explosion at the embassy, escapes pursuit by jumping onto a speedboat, and delivers a bomb package in Los Angeles.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Hu Li is on the street after an explosion, showing no distress.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Hu Li delivers a bomb to Isabella, exposing her identity to Carter and Lee.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The bomb threat remains active, and her operational security is compromised.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Lee and Carter's Evolving Partnership
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Lee initially lies to Carter about the case, leading to conflict and revelation. They bond while trapped, cooperate on a plan to retrieve plates, and end as friends planning a trip to New York.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Lee deceives Carter about the reason for going to a club.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Lee and Carter are friends, with Lee giving his father's badge to Carter and accepting money for a vacation.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Lee's Personal Vendetta and Closure
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Lee receives hints about his father's past from Master Fu, confides in Carter about the murder, confronts Ricky Tan who confirms killing his father, and after Tan's death, Lee gives away the badge, achieving closure.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Lee is directed to 'Heaven on Earth' with hints about his father's connection.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Lee has resolved his father's murder and let go of the badge.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Lee's Changing Role in the Investigation
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Lee accepts the embassy bombing case but is ordered to stop by U.S. authorities. He is later recruited by the Secret Service to find counterfeit plates and works on a plan to retrieve them.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Lee is on active duty for the embassy bombing case.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Lee is working for the U.S. Secret Service on locating counterfeit plates.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The location of the counterfeit plates is unknown, but a plan is in place.
